title: cleome muricata
intro: Cleome muricata, also known as the tropical spider flower or hairy spider flower, is a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia, characterized by its unique, spider-like flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cleome muricata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Cleome muricata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used topically in the form of ointments and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
